title: Putterlickia pyracantha
taxonomy: Putterlickia pyracantha is classified as a species of plant in the Celastraceae family, commonly known as the staff vine family. This family consists of about 60-70 genera and 1,000-1,300 species of flowering plants. Putterlickia pyracantha is native to South Africa and is a type of climbing vine with spiny stems and clusters of white or yellow flowers.
